# Talk Page Correlation

## What
Create a `talkCorrelator` analyzer that matches article revision timestamps to nearby talk page revision timestamps, producing `talk_page_correlated` events.

## Why
The event type `talk_page_correlated` is reserved in the schema (evidence.ts:24) but zero code produces it. Correlating edits with their corresponding talk page discussions is the bridge between "what changed" (L1) and "why it changed" (L3).

## Context
Read first:
- `packages/evidence-graph/src/schemas/evidence.ts` — `EventType` union, `EvidenceEvent` shape, `DeterministicFact`
- `packages/analyzers/src/section-differ.ts` — example L1 analyzer pattern (function + export)
- `packages/analyzers/src/index.ts` — barrel exports, existing analyzer interface pattern
- `packages/ingestion/src/index.ts` — `RevisionFetcher` interface (talk page revisions come through this)
- `packages/analyzers/src/__tests__/section-differ.test.ts` — test pattern

## Implementation
1. Create `packages/analyzers/src/talk-correlator.ts`
2. Export a function `correlateTalkRevisions(articleRevs: Revision[], talkRevs: Revision[]): EvidenceEvent[]`
3. Correlation logic: for each article revision, find talk page revisions whose timestamp falls within a configurable window (default: 7 days before to 3 days after the article edit). Match the closest one.
4. Each match produces one `EvidenceEvent` with:
   - `eventType: "talk_page_correlated"`
   - `fromRevisionId`: article revision ID
   - `toRevisionId`: matched talk page revision ID
   - `section: ""` (talk pages don't use the same section model)
   - `deterministicFacts`: include time delta and a `detail` summarizing the talk page edit comment
   - `layer: "observed"`
5. Export from `packages/analyzers/src/index.ts`
6. Add the function to the `analyze` command pipeline in `packages/cli/src/commands/analyze.ts` — after fetching article revisions, fetch talk page revisions (using L1-01's method) and run the correlator

## Invariants
- L1 only — no NLP, no model. Pure timestamp matching.
- Deterministic: same inputs → same correlation output
- Talk page edit comment goes into `deterministicFacts.detail`, not `modelInterpretation`

## Acceptance
- [ ] Gate: `bun run build && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test`
- [ ] Write a test in `packages/analyzers/src/__tests__/talk-correlator.test.ts` with synthetic `Revision[]` arrays, verifying:
  - A talk revision within the window is matched
  - A talk revision outside the window is not matched
  - Multiple article revisions each get the closest talk revision
- [ ] Exported from `packages/analyzers/src/index.ts`
- [ ] Integrated into analyze command pipeline
- [ ] Update ROADMAP.md status for L1-02 to `done` and unblock L2-01, INFRA-01
